name: Reflected UO2 Pin Cell
provenance: spec-derived teaching deck — k-inf cross-checked against run-verified OpenMC twin
description: Classic "hello world" PWR pin cell: one BEAVRS-spec 3.1 wt% UO2 fuel pin (pellet 0.39218 / clad 0.40005-0.45720 cm, pitch 1.26 cm, active height 365.76 cm) in 975 ppm borated water with reflective boundaries on all six faces, so kcode converges to the infinite-lattice k-inf (~1.23). Same materials/dimensions as the OpenMC/Serpent/SCONE pin-cell twins.

name: Reflected UO2 Pin Cell
description: Classic "hello world" PWR pin cell for OpenMC (Python, modern API): one BEAVRS-spec 3.1 wt% UO2 fuel pin (pellet 0.39218 / clad 0.40005-0.45720 cm, pitch 1.26 cm, active height 365.76 cm) in 975 ppm borated water, reflective on all six faces -> k-inf. Temperature on cells (600 K), S(a,b) on water only. Same system as the MCNP/Serpent/SCONE pin-cell twins.

name: Reflected UO2 Pin Cell
provenance: spec-derived teaching deck — k-inf cross-checked against run-verified OpenMC twin
description: Classic "hello world" PWR pin cell for Serpent 2: one BEAVRS-spec 3.1 wt% UO2 fuel pin (pellet 0.39218 / clad 0.40005-0.45720 cm, pitch 1.26 cm, active height 365.76 cm) in 975 ppm borated water, set bc 2 (reflective) -> k-inf (~1.23). Pin universe + cuboid cell, MeV energies. Same system as the MCNP/OpenMC/SCONE pin-cell twins.

name: Reflected UO2 Pin Cell
provenance: spec-derived teaching deck — k-inf cross-checked against run-verified OpenMC twin
description: Classic "hello world" PWR pin cell for SCONE: one BEAVRS-spec 3.1 wt% UO2 fuel pin (pellet 0.39218 / clad 0.40005-0.45720 cm, pitch 1.26 cm, active height 365.76 cm) in 975 ppm borated water, reflective boundary (1 1 1 1 1 1) -> k-inf (~1.23). pinUniverse + box root, H-1 included free-gas (moder swap documented in header). Same system as the MCNP/OpenMC/Serpent pin-cell twins.

name: BEAVRS Full Core
provenance: translated from verified SCONE — geometry/materials-faithful, not benchmark-validated
description: MIT BEAVRS Cycle 1 PWR benchmark, full 193-assembly core (975 ppm boron, HFP 600K, CRs withdrawn). Westinghouse 4-loop, 17x17 lattices, 1.6/2.4/3.1 wt% UO2 zones, Pyrex burnable-poison clusters, full axial pin stacks (grid spacers, plena, end plugs), SS304 baffle/barrel/shields, downcomer, RPV. Translated layer-for-layer from the verified Cambridge SCONE deck. Community example deck — not an official MIT/CRPG product.

name: 17x17 PWR Assembly
description: Westinghouse-style 17x17 PWR assembly (264 fuel pins, 24 guide tubes, 1 instrument tube). Physically sane geometry/materials for visualization; kcode block is nominal.

name: 17x17 PWR Assembly
description: Westinghouse-style 17x17 PWR assembly for Serpent. Physically sane geometry/materials for visualization; settings are nominal.

name: 17x17 PWR Assembly
description: Westinghouse-style 17x17 PWR assembly for OpenMC (Python). Built from OWEN's omc_assembly_script snippet; modern OpenMC API. Starter/visualization deck, not a validated benchmark.
